description_long: This is a modern, boxy house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, surrounded by a fenced yard with green lawns, trees, and a small swimming pool. The exterior walls are clad in light brown brick, and the windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with some narrow horizontal and vertical openings. The front yard features a paved driveway leading to the main entrance, which is set into a simple, unadorned facade. The backyard includes a pool area with lounge chairs and a blossoming tree, providing a private outdoor retreat. The house appears to have two stories, with an open balcony or terrace on the upper level. The landscaping is clean and geometric, complementing the contemporary architectural style.
description: A modern, two-story brick house with a flat roof, asymmetrical windows, and a fenced yard featuring a pool and landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, pool, and a blossoming tree in the yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped side wall, grassy yard, and partial view of the pool and tree.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the long, windowed brick wall, driveway, and several trees along the fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the driveway, main entrance, and a clear look at the front lawn and pool area.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flush door with no porch, accessed by a paved driveway, minimal decorative elements
